markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss GrowthX Labs' SEO and content strategy approach for potential partnership with Outreach](https://fathom.video/share/RtFxmer_uhCxCdv1_EsXywuLCu4CfWNx?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX Labs presented an SEO content audit, revealing significant traffic growth potential for Outreach's blog](https://fathom.video/share/RtFxmer_uhCxCdv1_EsXywuLCu4CfWNx?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Proposed editorial strategy aligns with Outreach's integrated marketing campaigns and target audience](https://fathom.video/share/RtFxmer_uhCxCdv1_EsXywuLCu4CfWNx?tab=summary&timestamp=514.0)
  - [GrowthX offers comprehensive services including content creation, technical SEO, and repurposing for various formats](https://fathom.video/share/RtFxmer_uhCxCdv1_EsXywuLCu4CfWNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1315.0)
  - [12-month retainer model recommended for optimal results, emphasizing long-term SEO success](https://fathom.video/share/RtFxmer_uhCxCdv1_EsXywuLCu4CfWNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)

## Topics

### SEO Content Audit

  - [Analyzed 347 Outreach blog posts for optimization opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/RtFxmer_uhCxCdv1_EsXywuLCu4CfWNx?tab=summary&timestamp=268.0)
  - [Identified potential to 8x traffic through content refreshes and improvements](https://fathom.video/share/RtFxmer_uhCxCdv1_EsXywuLCu4CfWNx?tab=summary&timestamp=375.0)
  - [Examined 554 competitor content gaps, categorized by difficulty (easy, average, hard)](https://fathom.video/share/RtFxmer_uhCxCdv1_EsXywuLCu4CfWNx?tab=summary&timestamp=405.0)
  - [Opportunity to potentially 5x traffic by addressing easy-to-target content gaps](https://fathom.video/share/RtFxmer_uhCxCdv1_EsXywuLCu4CfWNx?tab=summary&timestamp=445.0)

### Editorial Strategy Alignment

  - [Proposed developing a unique editorial mission and voice for Outreach's content](https://fathom.video/share/RtFxmer_uhCxCdv1_EsXywuLCu4CfWNx?tab=summary&timestamp=635.0)
  - [Suggested creating content that appeals to aspirational readers (e.g., "for people who sign the board deck")](https://fathom.video/share/RtFxmer_uhCxCdv1_EsXywuLCu4CfWNx?tab=summary&timestamp=709.0)
  - [Emphasized aligning content with Outreach's campaign themes (e.g., "best customers")](https://fathom.video/share/RtFxmer_uhCxCdv1_EsXywuLCu4CfWNx?tab=summary&timestamp=596.0)
  - [Recommended deep audience analysis to better understand pain points and content needs](https://fathom.video/share/RtFxmer_uhCxCdv1_EsXywuLCu4CfWNx?tab=summary&timestamp=780.0)

### Content Creation and Repurposing

  - [Focus on creating high-quality, in-depth content that can be repurposed into various formats](https://fathom.video/share/RtFxmer_uhCxCdv1_EsXywuLCu4CfWNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
  - [Example: Transforming basic "interview questions" article into comprehensive guide with custom research, quotes, and sample dialogues](https://fathom.video/share/RtFxmer_uhCxCdv1_EsXywuLCu4CfWNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1044.0)
  - [Capability to convert webinars/podcasts into detailed articles, enhancing SEO value and user experience](https://fathom.video/share/RtFxmer_uhCxCdv1_EsXywuLCu4CfWNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1201.0)

### Technical SEO and Content Management

  - [Offer technical SEO expertise, including internal linking, schema, and meta tags](https://fathom.video/share/RtFxmer_uhCxCdv1_EsXywuLCu4CfWNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1451.0)
  - [Can handle content staging and publishing to minimize client workload](https://fathom.video/share/RtFxmer_uhCxCdv1_EsXywuLCu4CfWNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
  - [Flexible in adapting to Outreach's existing SEO brief templates and processes](https://fathom.video/share/RtFxmer_uhCxCdv1_EsXywuLCu4CfWNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1548.0)

### Collaboration and Review Process

  - [Weekly meetings and daily Slack communication for alignment](https://fathom.video/share/RtFxmer_uhCxCdv1_EsXywuLCu4CfWNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
  - [Flexible approval process for content ideas and assignments](https://fathom.video/share/RtFxmer_uhCxCdv1_EsXywuLCu4CfWNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1552.0)
  - [Preference for batched approvals to maximize efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/RtFxmer_uhCxCdv1_EsXywuLCu4CfWNx?tab=summary&timestamp=1583.0)

## Next Steps

  - Outreach team to internally discuss the proposal and potential partnership
  - Review the shared Statement of Work (SOW) document
  - Determine timing for potential kickoff if moving forward with GrowthX Labs
  - Consider GrowthX's recommendation for a 12-month engagement for optimal SEO results
